nodes.label: Unit tests for the ``omni opencode`` launcher helpers (``opencode_native.py``).
Async httpx stand-in returning one preset response per call.
A fresh session records its launch cwd for later resumes.      :param monkeypatc
A failed launch-state write warns rather than breaking the launch.      :param m
Resume with no recorded launch state neither prompts nor moves cwd.      :param
Resume from the recorded cwd must not prompt or move cwd.      :param monkeypatc
Choosing ``switch`` changes cwd to the recorded directory.      :param monkeypat
Choosing ``cancel`` aborts the resume without moving cwd.      :param monkeypatc
A recorded-but-missing cwd fails loud instead of resuming wrong.      :param mon
The cwd-mismatch prompt offers ``switch``/``cancel`` and defaults to switch.
Remote resume aligns cwd before the daemon prepare samples it.      Drives the r
A fresh remote session records its launch cwd after prepare (no align).      :pa
